certification_basis: The AiGOL CLI exposes bridge list/show/pending/approved/rejected/chain/execution-request commands.
The command group recognizes implementation-plan-to-execution-request bridge link artifacts and derived execution request artifacts.
Replay wrapper hashes and bridge artifact hashes are validated before display.
Canonical chain continuity and execution request references are preserved in operator output.
Corrupt bridge replay fails closed in operator-visible output.
The command group does not dispatch, invoke, execute, mutate governance, mutate replay, create execution requests, bypass authorization runtimes, or infer human authorization.
known_limitations: The command group is inspection and visibility oriented; it does not create bridge transitions or execution requests.
Rejected and pending bridge states are displayed only when replay-visible bridge evidence records those states.
